side_effects.description: Cluster headache cycle reactivated after approximately 7-8 years of remission; OP attributes this directly to melanotan I use as the only new variable at the time

protocol_notes: OP had previously broken a cluster headache cycle approximately 7-8 years prior using 'heroic doses' (unspecified substances). Has extensive hormone and related labs. Located in Texas, noting limited access to cycle-busting tools. Former smoker. Notes alcohol is a known trigger during active cycles.
